ol.li: Extract Byte 0 (bits 0..7) via value & 0xFF -> Store at base + 0
Extract Byte 1 (bits 8..15) via (value >> 8) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 1
Extract Byte 2 (bits 16..23) via (value >> 16) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 2
Extract Byte 3 (bits 24..31) via (value >> 24) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 3

div.p: Implementation (C-Style): c uint32_t val = 0x12345678; uint8_t mem = (uint8_t)ptr; mem[0] = (uint8_t)((val >> 0) & 0xFF); // 0x78 (LSB) mem[1] = (uint8_t)((val >> 8) & 0xFF); // 0x56 mem[2] = (uint8_t)((val >> 16) & 0xFF); // 0x34 mem[3] = (uint8_t)((val >> 24) & 0xFF); // 0x12 (MSB)
Architecture Target: x86-64, ARM Cortex (LE), RISC-V.
